task.zh: 终极挑战：抛100次硬币！预测最终正面的百分比，看看你能猜多准！
task.en: Ultimate challenge: Flip 100 times! Predict the final heads percentage — how close can you get?

question.zh: 100次抛硬币后，正面的百分比会是多少？（在40%-60%之间猜一个数）
question.en: After 100 flips, what will the heads percentage be? (Guess between 40%-60%)

hints.zh: 次数越多越接近50%，但很少刚好是50%
hints.en: More flips → closer to 50%, but rarely exactly 50%
With 100 flips, heads is usually between 45-55
